name: Rand Paul for President
subject: Why liberals are wrong on gun control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Patriot, To Big Government politicians in BOTH parties, more government is always the solution to our problems. Just days after the recent terrorist attacks in Paris, Hillary Clinton went on a rampage, demanding leaders in the U.S. House and Senate pass more gun control. _Do they never stop to think that more freedom and more guns in the hands of law abiding citizens might actually make us safer?_ **Patriot, I believe we've had enough of politicians giving nothing but lip service to liberty.** I think it's time we had a President who is willing to stand strong for our Constitution's Bill of Rights. [If you agree, please make your most generous contribution to my campaign right away.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32071900:WlUaEGyNv:m:1:879035888:E53AEA325371FE706DFADE7A08E422AE:r) | | [GIVE $10 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32071901:WlUaEGyNv:m:1:879035888:E53AEA325371FE706DFADE7A08E422AE:r)
---
[GIVE $25 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32071902:WlUaEGyNv:m:1:879035888:E53AEA325371FE706DFADE7A08E422AE:r)
[GIVE $50 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32071900:WlUaEGyNv:m:1:879035888:E53AEA325371FE706DFADE7A08E422AE:r)
[$100 MONEYBOMB >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32071903:WlUaEGyNv:m:1:879035888:E53AEA325371FE706DFADE7A08E422AE:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32071903:WlUaEGyNv:m:1:879035888:E53AEA325371FE706DFADE7A08E422AE:r)

**The December 15 Republican debate is rapidly approaching -- the last debate of 2015 -- and I need all hands on deck.**

As I told you recently, I introduced the Defend Our Capital Act to restore law-abiding Americans right to carry concealed weapons in Washington, D.C.

This legislation will immediately improve the security of our country and the safety of those visiting the Capitol by:
* Requiring the District of Columbia to begin issuing concealed weapons permits for both residents and non-residents.
* Allowing for national reciprocity of conceal and carry weapons permits between states and for carry by active duty military.
* Allowing for the carrying of firearms on public, non-sensitive areas of federal property.
* Allowing for the purchase of firearms across state lines.

As a U.S. Senator, I've always stood strong for our gun rights -- even as I've witnessed members of both parties attempt to gut them.

To anti-gun activists and politicians, tragic attacks are always the perfect excuse to try and ram more gun control into law.

**They never bother looking at how their own misguided policies -- like so-called "gun free zones" and wide open borders -- contribute.**

Patriot, the principles embedded in our Constitution are the reason America became the greatest and freest nation in human history.

We need a President who will uphold those principles once again.
That's why I'm running.
[Can I count on you to stand with me by making your most generous contribution of $50, $25 or $10 right away?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32071900:WlUaEGyNv:m:1:879035888:E53AEA325371FE706DFADE7A08E422AE:r)
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Paid for by Rand Paul for President
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

name: Team Marco
subject: this week on MarcoRubio.com
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45242643:637Lf_LcN:m:1:1349778030:BDC0C2EEAAC551968407C9FE201EE09B:r)
---
| | | | Peter, It's been a big week for Marco: He's crisscrossing the country drawing big crowds, he's been fighting President Obama's plans for an ObamaCare bailout, and he's pushed back against the incredibly opportunistic liberal push for gun control after the horrific terror attack in San Bernardino. We've been covering it all on MarcoRubio.com, with posts, op-eds, videos, and more. A sampling of what we've put up in the past week:
---
| |
---
| It took the left just a few hours to start manipulating the attack in San Bernardino for their political purposes, and Marco has been hammering home the most obvious problem with this: The proposals Democrats have been pushing would do nothing to stop mass shootings, let alone terror attacks like the one in San Bernardino. They would, of course, restrict law-abiding American's rights. **[Watch what Marco had to say on CBS about the nonsense liberal narrative:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45242644:637Lf_LcN:m:1:1349778030:BDC0C2EEAAC551968407C9FE201EE09B:r)**
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45242645:637Lf_LcN:m:1:1349778030:BDC0C2EEAAC551968407C9FE201EE09B:r)
---
|
---
| |
---
| On Thursday, the Republican Jewish Coalition hosted a forum for presidential candidates, a big opportunity for them to show their foreign policy chops and explain their commitment to Israel. Naturally, Marco's performance was far and away the best of the day -- he got a standing ovation on taking the stage, got rave reviews from the audience and observers, and laid out better than any other candidate his clear commitments to America's strongest ally in the Middle East. **[Watch his speech and read it here:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45242646:637Lf_LcN:m:1:1349778030:BDC0C2EEAAC551968407C9FE201EE09B:r)**
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45242647:637Lf_LcN:m:1:1349778030:BDC0C2EEAAC551968407C9FE201EE09B:r)
---
|
---
| |
---
| As you've probably heard, a legislative Marco started fighting for more than two years ago is causing major problems for ObamaCare. Big insurance companies are losing lots of money on the failing health care law, and the Obama Administration wants to give it to them -- but the provision Marco got into law has stopped them for now. That fight is ongoing, and Marco's been making his case for it whenever he can.
**[Watch what he had to say about it on Neil Cavuto the other day:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45242648:637Lf_LcN:m:1:1349778030:BDC0C2EEAAC551968407C9FE201EE09B:r)**
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45242649:637Lf_LcN:m:1:1349778030:BDC0C2EEAAC551968407C9FE201EE09B:r)
---
| **[Read more about the fight here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45242650:637Lf_LcN:m:1:1349778030:BDC0C2EEAAC551968407C9FE201EE09B:r)**
---
| |
---
| It's been an intense week on the campaign trail for Marco: He packed two events in New Hampshire on Monday, including Senator Scott Brown's "No BS Barbecue"; he got an enthusiastic reception at the College of Charleston in South Carolina; and then he held a rally in Guntersville, Alabama, that drew almost a thousand people.
---
| |
---
| Read up on the coverage of Marco's momentum **[here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45242651:637Lf_LcN:m:1:1349778030:BDC0C2EEAAC551968407C9FE201EE09B:r)** That's it for this week! We hope you like everything we've been doing to promote Marco, and please share anything you've read or seen from our site that you like -- that just helps Marco get his message out there even more effectively. Thanks for your support,
Team Marco
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Too many emails? Click [here](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive updates less often.[
Unsubscribe](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

name: John Kasich
subject: 🚍Note from the Road 🚍
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
Peter, we're on the road in New Hampshire and I wanted to send
you a quick note in between events (while taking a quick break
for some ice cream!)

Excitement is growing for our campaign. It's real and
we're seeing it every day out here.

Americans are craving leadership and desperately want a
President who can unite us so we can face our biggest challenges
together.

It's hard to believe, but the Iowa Caucuses are are in
less than 60 days and we're less than 100 days away from more
than two-dozen other early primary states.

Here are a few ways that you can help right now:

1. Sign up to volunteer and we'll be in touch soon about
how you can help in your area. JohnKasich.com/Volunteer

2. Consider a generous $10, $25, $50 or more contribution
that will help us continue to grow our campaign.

3. Read more about my plan to make America safer and
defeat ISIS. Share it with your friends & family:
JohnKasich.com/NationalSecurity

Peter, Hillary Clinton's advisors are terrified of my
candidacy because they know that she won't beat us in 2016. Let's
show them how right they are.

Thank you for all that you're doing.

-John

Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Robby Mook, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Quick survey for you--
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
We want to hear from you | Friend --

2015 is coming to a close, and we need to know now: **[Are you on Team Hillary?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjQxNjkwMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTQyNjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

We are 58 days away from the Iowa caucus -- before you know it, folks all across the country will be casting their ballots for Hillary.

**She needs you on her side more than ever, so let her know you 're with her:** [ | | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQxNjkwMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTQyNjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQxNjkwMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTQyNjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks!

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=41&ms=MjQxNjkwMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTQyNjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQxNjkwMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTQyNjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjQxNjkwMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTQyNjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQxNjkwMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTQyNjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQxNjkwMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTQyNjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQxNjkwMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTQyNjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=32&ms=MjQxNjkwMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTQyNjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=42&ms=MjQxNjkwMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTQyNjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQxNjkwMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTQyNjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=27&ms=MjQxNjkwMTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTQyNjEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Rick Santorum
subject: Friend, 3 days.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend,
[Did you enter to be my guest at the next GOP Debate in Las Vegas?](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fvegas-debate&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_2&n=1) Only three days left to enter to win a trip to Las Vegas as my guest for the upcoming CNN/Salem Radio Republican Presidential Debate on December 15th.

I’m planning on laying out our clear plan to defeat ISIS once and for all, secure our borders, and make sure Iran never develops a nuclear weapon. **Why watch history from home when you can be right there to see it live and in person!** [](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fvegas-debate&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_2&n=2)
So don’t delay,[ enter to win your ring side seats today.](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fvegas-debate&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_2&n=3) **_See you in Vegas!_** Rick

[Click here to make a donation of $20.16 or more and you will automatically be entered to win seats, travel and hotel to the Las Vegas presidential debate.](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fvegas-debate&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_2&n=4) [

](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fvegas-debate&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_2&n=5) NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN THIS PROMOTION. No contribution of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances or odds of winning. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Void where prohibited. All applicable federal, state, and local laws and regulations apply. Please [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fvegas-debate&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_2&n=6) to enter by making a contribution of $20.16. Please [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/vegas_debate?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_2&n=7) to enter without making a contribution. You must complete and submit the online entry form during the contest period. This Promotion begins on Tuesday, December 1, 2015 at 6:00 p.m. Eastern Standard Time and ends on Tuesday, December 8, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time (“Entry Period”). All entries must be received by11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Tuesday, December 8, 2015. One winner will receive the following Prize: two tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in Las Vegas, Nevada on December 15, 2015; a $600 travel stipend for travel to Las Vegas, Nevada for the winner and one guest, with an approximate retail value of $600; and hotel accommodations for the winner and a guest, with an approximate retail value of $250. Prize may not be substituted or exchanged and is not redeemable for cash. All federal, state, and local taxes associated with the receipt or use of any prize awarded are the sole responsibility of the winner. The Sponsor of this Promotion is Santorum For President 2016, PO Box 247 Verona, PA 15147.

---

clean_body: | Friend, Only three days left to enter to win a trip to Las Vegas as my guest for the upcoming CNN/Salem Radio Republican Presidential Debate on December 15th. I’m planning on laying out our clear plan to defeat ISIS once and for all, secure our borders, and make sure Iran never develops a nuclear weapon. Why watch history from home when you can be right there to see it live and in person! So don’t delay, See you in Vegas! Rick NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN THIS PROMOTION. No contribution of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances or odds of winning. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Void where prohibited. All applicable federal, state, and local laws and regulations apply. Please to enter by making a contribution of $20.16. Please to enter without making a contribution. You must complete and submit the online entry form during the contest period. This Promotion begins on Tuesday, December 1, 2015 at 6:00 p.m. Eastern Standard Time and ends on Tuesday, December 8, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time (“Entry Period”). All entries must be received by11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Tuesday, December 8, 2015. One winner will receive the following Prize: two tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in Las Vegas, Nevada on December 15, 2015; a $600 travel stipend for travel to Las Vegas, Nevada for the winner and one guest, with an approximate retail value of $600; and hotel accommodations for the winner and a guest, with an approximate retail value of $250. Prize may not be substituted or exchanged and is not redeemable for cash. All federal, state, and local taxes associated with the receipt or use of any prize awarded are the sole responsibility of the winner. The Sponsor of this Promotion is Santorum For President 2016, PO Box 247 Verona, PA 15147. Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Maya Harris, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Taking on the NRA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
It's time to act. | Friend --

On Thursday, while Republicans in Congress again voted down legislation for sensible gun violence prevention, Hillary made a strong, clear case for action:

_"We need to take action now. No parent should have to worry about sending their kids to school, or going to a movie theater, or even going to church. No one should have that basic sense of safety and security ripped away from them."_

**[I couldn’t agree more. If you’re committed to making sure our next president will tackle gun violence head on, will you add your name right now to stand with Hillary?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQxNjkzNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTYyNDg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Hillary has been fighting hard to prevent gun violence for decades, from her vocal support of the Brady Bill in 1993 to her calls on the campaign trail to take on the NRA and pass commonsense solutions to keep guns out of the hands of dangerous criminals. She is the champion we need on this issue -- but she needs all of us to stand behind her.

**Add your name right now to say you stand with Hillary on gun violence prevention:** [ | | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjQxNjkzNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTYyNDg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjQxNjkzNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTYyNDg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Maya

Maya Harris
Senior Policy Advisor
Hillary for America

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=32&ms=MjQxNjkzNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTYyNDg2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQxNjkzNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTYyNDg2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjQxNjkzNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTYyNDg2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQxNjkzNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTYyNDg2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQxNjkzNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTYyNDg2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQxNjkzNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTYyNDg2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=26&ms=MjQxNjkzNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTYyNDg2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=33&ms=MjQxNjkzNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTYyNDg2S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQxNjkzNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTYyNDg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjQxNjkzNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNTYyNDg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
